text.title: Characterization Test Recipes Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure from "we want to refactor this legacy code" to "suite-manifest signed off + refactor branch unblocked".

step.name: capture-inputs
step.input: access to production logs / staging traffic, target module.
step.action: Sample inputs at production rate. Redact PII at capture time. Save as `tests/characterization/fixtures/<origin>-NNN.json`. Manifest each fixture with origin, capture_date, redaction status.
step.decision-gate: If redaction status=false for any fixture — STOP, redact before commit.

step.name: build-normalizer
step.action: Centralise normalisation in `tests/characterization/normalize.{py,ts,go}`. Replace timestamps with `<TS>`, UUIDs with `<UUID>`, sort unordered lists. Every snapshot test imports this module.
step.output: normalize module + unit tests for the normalizer itself.
step.decision-gate: If any test does ad-hoc normalisation — STOP, move it into normalize.

step.name: snapshot-baseline
step.input: fixtures, legacy code on the capture branch.
step.action: Run each fixture through the legacy code. Normalize. Write to `tests/characterization/snapshots/<fixture_id>.snap`. Human review every snapshot line-by-line. Commit signoff with reviewer + date + commit sha.
step.decision-gate: If signoff missing — STOP, suite is not refactor-ready.

step.name: sweep-to-coverage
step.action: Run coverage. If branch_coverage_pct < 70%, add fixtures targeting uncovered branches. Iterate.
step.decision-gate: If coverage < threshold after 3 iterations — STOP, verdict block-insufficient-coverage.

step.name: wrap-refactor
step.action: Refactor proceeds. On any snapshot diff, classify as (a) intentional fix (log + retest), (b) accidental regression (revert), (c) new non-determinism (extend normalizer). Disable CI auto-update.
step.output: refactor branch with green characterization suite.
step.decision-gate: If CI auto-update fires — STOP and reconfigure.
